---
id: user-login
title: "Log in and retrieve an API key"
description: "Authenticates a user by username and password and returns their API key for use in subsequent authenticated requests."

hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "post api-method"
info_path: api/public/churchcrm-public-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

  as={"h1"}

  children={"Log in and retrieve an API key"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/public/user/login"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Authenticates a user by username and password and returns their API key for use in subsequent authenticated requests.
